code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no target")
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < parts.len()
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      return Err("missing part")
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      return Err("parse error")
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    return Err("bad target")
  end

  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  mut result = -1
  while lo <= hi
    let mid = lo + (hi - lo) / 2
    let mid_val = match nums.get(mid)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      lo = hi + 1
      mid
    end
    if mid_val == target
      result = mid
      lo = hi + 1
    else if mid_val < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end

  if result >= 0
    print("index=#{result}")
  else
    print("not_found")
  end

  Ok(())
end
